landquest.title: LandQuest
landquest.description: A GPS + NFC treasure-hunt app for real land. Play a demo hunt — follow riddles across a moonlit map, home in with the radar, and uncover the property's secrets.

wikihouse-configurator.description: Interactive 3D configurator for a WikiHouse Skylark 250 cabin — arrange modules, preview the build, and export the block list.

extras.title: 3D Modeling Portfolio
extras.description: Fusion 360 designs and functional prints, viewable and spinnable right in the browser.
